creator: sevan@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Christian Sturm from comment #3)
I've just moved to 11.1-RC2 & unable to start virtual machines so can't confirm if there is regression into a new problem but for now machine isn't panicking. Instead I receive:

RTR3InitEx failed with rc=-8 (rc=-8)

Please try reinstalling VirtualBox.

where: supR3HardenedMainInitRuntime what: 4 VERR_NO_MEMORY (-8) - Memory allocation failed.
